leadText: Ruination (Japanese: カタストロフィ Catastrophe) is a damage-dealing Dark-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of the treasures of ruin.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Ruination deals damage equal to 50% of the opponent's remaining HP , rounded down. It always deals at least 1 HP of damage.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user summons a ruinous disaster. This cuts the target’s HP in half.
